title: Cubelets Cobblemon
description: Join our Cobblemon Minecraft server where Pokémon meets the world of blocks! Whether you're a seasoned trainer or new to Pokémon, Cubelets offers a safe and fun environment for everyone.
body:
![cubelets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66ce84de18166592b67165dc30ca2d06a50fb9e2.png)

This modpack is made for Cubelets Cobblemon server. We are a small, friendly community server perfect for those looking for a more casual and relaxed experience! No stress, just good vibes!

Discord: https://discord.gg/rxRHHvwXR6
Server IP: cubelets.mcserver.us

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6851b909555bc698e9a7fa84a2f56f012bff595.png)

Join our Cobblemon server where Pokémon meets the world of blocks! Whether you're a seasoned trainer or new to Pokémon, Cubelets offers a safe and fun environment for everyone. Here are our key features:

We are a small, friendly community server perfect for those looking for a more casual and relaxed experience! No stress, just good vibes! Join our Cobblemon server where Pokémon meets the world of blocks!

[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1301cb3fda92fc7137a3a46eda9995d7b0e1aa3.png)](https://discord.gg/rxRHHvwXR6)
